'''Wadda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] who worked as a henchman in a large [[Slavery/Legends|slaving]] ring led by [[Zlarb/Legends|Zlarb]] around [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].<ref name="hsr" /> A massive individual from a little-known [[Species/Legends|species]]—very few of Wadda's kind ever left their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]—Wadda towered over most other beings at over 2.2 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall,<ref name="cswe" /> and helped serve as the [[Riot gun/Legends|riot gun]]-wielding muscle for the group. In 2 BBY, Wadda went with Zlarb and several others on a run to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lur]], where they attempted to strong arm a pair of unsuspecting [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], into carrying a number of [[Lurrian]] captives. Morally opposed to slavery, Solo and Chewbacca fought back, killing Zlarb and several others. Although a confrontation with the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] Chewbacca left Wadda battered and bruised, he survived for Solo and Chewbacca to leave him at the mercy of Lurrians they had attempted to sell into slavery.<ref name="hsr" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wadda first appeared in ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'', a novel written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1979]].<ref name="hsr" /> He was pictured by [[Mike Vilardi]] in [[1993]]'s ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''.<ref name="hsc">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref>
